use_cases: Mobile app navigation with icon-based menu items and active state indicators
Bottom tab bar for quick switching between major app sections like home, settings, and profile
Interactive menu for controlling navigation on mobile-optimized web interfaces
Customizable icon menu for displaying contextual actions based on user role or permissions
ai_summary: A modern mobile navigation menu featuring interactive icon-based menu items with animated active state indicators. The component supports 2-5 navigation items with customizable accent colors, tracks active selection state, and adjusts indicator width responsively. Ideal for mobile-first apps and responsive web interfaces requiring a sleek, minimal navigation solution.
